@graph.description: Aromatic sesquiterpene formed during chamomile steam distillation. Inhibits 5-LOX and prostaglandin synthesis. Present in chamomile essential oil; anti-inflammatory evidence is primarily topical and in vitro.
@graph.name: chamazulene
